full_text:
Cao Gong 曹貢
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Gong (曹貢). Enfeoffed, and died without any achievements. Cao Gong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Gong lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
